title: Saga Legal has made two Associate Partners
description: Saga Legal has announced its annual round of leadership promotions: Antra Ahuja and Shilpa Chaudhury have been made Associate Partners, and Veera Mathai has been made Counsel.Ahuja is a corporate lawyer with experience across Corporate, TMT & Data Privacy, advising clients from start-ups to multinational organisations, and playing a key role in leading mandates and complex commercial negotiations with a solution-oriented approach.Chaudhury has significant experience in Intellectual Property
